divine_spark.note: +1 great person point per campus, holy site and theater square

tithe.note: +1 gold per 4 cities following this religion

world_church.note: +1 culture per 5 cities following this religion

choral_music.note: +2 culture in following cities with a shrine

work_ethic.note: +1 production per holy site in following cities

feed_the_world.note: +2 food in following cities with a shrine
